Question: Match the term with its definition or example
Answer:
1) Oxygen - a) Gas needed for respiration and combustion
2) Nitrogen - b) Major component of air, dilutes oxygen
3) Carbon dioxide - c) Gas used by plants in photosynthesis
4) Water vapour - d) Gaseous form of water present in air
5) Argon - e) Noble gas present in air in small amount
6) Air pressure - f) Force exerted by air on surfaces
7) Wind - g) Moving air due to pressure differences
8) Atmosphere - h) Layer of gases surrounding Earth
9) Smog - i) Mixture of smoke and fog
10) Air pollution - j) Presence of harmful substances in air
11) Barometer - k) Instrument to measure air pressure
12) Humidity - l) Amount of water vapour in air
13) Greenhouse gases - m) Gases that trap heat in atmosphere
14) Aerosols - n) Tiny particles suspended in air
15) Ventilation - o) Circulation of fresh air in closed spaces
